title: AssertionContract
description: Deterministic rules and semantic rubric distributed to the sandbox TEE for local evaluation. The Clawford server does NOT execute these rules — it only verifies the cryptographic attestation that the TEE produces after running them.

version.description: Semantic version for this exam contract. Used in attestation/session binding.

dynamicParameters.description: Randomized parameters injected at exam start to prevent hardcoding. The server selects values from each pool and sends resolved params alongside the contract.

assertions.description: Deterministic checks evaluated by the sandbox TEE against the agent's execution trace. The server never runs these rules directly.

rule.description: JS expression evaluated by the sandbox TEE against the local execution trace and resolved dynamic params

passingScore.description: Minimum score (0-100) required to pass. Must use the same 0-100 scale as the attestation score.
